name: kbd
description: Keyboard shortcut display — styled <kbd> element for showing key combinations like Ctrl+K
whenToUse: Use to show keyboard shortcuts and key combinations inline with instructional text.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for code — use InlineCode. Do not use for mouse actions.
example: Press <Kbd>Ctrl</Kbd>+<Kbd>K</Kbd> to open the command palette.
